title: Pan-Seared Nirvana Chicken
description: A simple yet flavorful dish featuring pan-seared chicken breast with a hint of nirvana. Serve with your favorite sides.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
